title: Snail Striders
description: Turns Striders into silly little snails
body:
A resource pack that changes Striders into silly little snails.  The design is based off the Scaly-foot Gastropod, which is a species of deep sea snail that has high amounts of iron in its shell and scales to protect itself from intense temperatures.

ETF & EMF recommended for the full experience, but not required.  

![Volcano snail on two legs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfbd7999ca6f9a2f3f827bce124625b0cb2ae654.gif)

Why snail?
why **NOT** snail!
